title: The First Riddle: Mad Dash Circuit ★

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
To be exact, we'll find our answer if we do laps around the deck! 1.6
laps to the right, then 2.4 laps to the left, and finally 2 laps to the
right!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: The key hint came from Fine—the info on the hotel's guide map! ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Um... I don't really get it, but basically we just have to go in circles,
right? C'mon Rice, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Ah—Urara, we're supposed to go right first!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Rice, Urara, be careful not to trip and injure yourselves.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Let us leave finding the item to those two. Personally, I'm more
curious to know how you solved the riddle.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to hear your thought process as well. We had just agreed that
"travel towards the queen's summit" referred to the path of the Triple
Tiara, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yup. But since this is a riddle, there's no way they actually want us to
run through each racecourse in person.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: That's when I remembered what Fine told us in the room...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I haven't, but I was shown the guide map when we arrived earlier. It's
standard protocol between my security and me to prepare for
emergencies.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Now if I recall, the map stated, "With an outer perimeter of 100
meters, our 250-meter tall observation deck provides a 360-degree
panoramic view of the city!"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I remember finding it interesting that the observation deck was
exactly 100 meters around. And then, when we read the riddle, that
same 100 was there again.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"Up in a gallery heaven-high, 10 becomes 1, and 100 becomes 10."
In other words, we divide all the measurements of this observation
deck by 10.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Then I thought, what if we divided the distances of all three Triple
Tiara races by 10, and then walked laps based on the running
direction of each racecourse?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I see, so the Oka Sho's 1,600 meters becomes 160 meters, and since
it takes place at the right-handed Hanshin Racecourse, we just need
to go to the right!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? We've been going round and round, but there's nothing here.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wh-what should we do? Did we mess up somewhere?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. They look like they could use some help.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
You two, from what I've seen, you didn't go far enough to the left
earlier. Let's try again from the start, together this time.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Haha, Ikuno's always looking out for others. I can't get enough of that
cute side of hers! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, we can always rely on her. ...Curren, do you mind answering
another question of mine?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Why did you not stop those three?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Curren, you told me that you wished to take this audition seriously, yes?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If I want to get my hands on the universe's cutest racewear, then I
couldn't ask for a better team, don'tcha think?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Faced with a time limit and fierce competition from rival teams, you
chose to forgo efficiency.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Instead of having them travel in circles to find the item, you could
have simply told them its location from the start. I find that strange.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Well, it's because I want the cutest racewear ever.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: "The cutest racewear ever?" Do explain.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yup! ♪ It's true that if I only cared about efficiency, then I should've
just told them where to look for the item.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But this is a team event, and in my eyes, getting all worked up by
myself and hogging the spotlight isn't cute at all.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Even if we won like that, and I had a dress made for me, I don't think
I'd look very cute in it.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
So that's why... You've been thinking about how Ms. Beauty views
your actions as well.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Spot on. Besides, look over there...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Found it! We did it this time!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: What a relief... Now we can move on to the next riddle.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Good work, you two. Let's put our heads together and solve the next
riddle as well!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's "cute" in their own way... I just thought it'd be a big shame
if they didn't get to show their cuteness off! ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Um... What's this thingy for?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It's a rather familiar design, but I can't imagine what we'd use it for.
Maybe we'll find out after we solve the second riddle?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: The next one looks tough... Um, I'll read it for everyone.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
"Lift your gaze to the room containing every number, for treasure
hides where the beholder lies. The legend begins on your marks."

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I wonder where "on your marks" refers to?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
At the very least, we can be safe in assuming that this riddle's telling
us to find a certain location, just like the last one...

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
"Bonjour, this is Beauty Anshinzawa! I see every team is making
splendid progress in solving their riddles!"

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
"But for now, I'm calling a quick break time! ♪ Everyone, please
gather in the main hall."
